docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TROUT, WILLIAM JOEL AS TO DEFENDANT THE BLACK CAR, INC. DBA FALCON LIMOUSINE
